UPDATE herb_disease_associations hda
SET prominence_score = (
  CAST(hda.classical_mentions AS DECIMAL) / 
  NULLIF((SELECT classical_frequency FROM herbs_master WHERE herb_id = hda.herb_id), 0)
) * COALESCE(hda.confidence_score, 0.85)
WHERE prominence_score IS NULL OR prominence_score = 0;

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT herb_id) as total_herbs,
  COUNT(DISTINCT disease_id) as total_diseases,
  COUNT(*) as total_associations,
  AVG(prominence_score) as avg_prominence,
  AVG(confidence_score) as avg_confidence
FROM herb_disease_associations;

WITH herb AS (
    INSERT INTO herbs_master (botanical_name, sanskrit_name, common_name, classical_prominence, validated_at)
    VALUES (
        '{{ String($json.herb_scientific || $json.herb_name).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ String($json.herb_sanskrit).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ String($json.herb_name).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        GREATEST(1, {{ Math.round(Number($json.confidence || 0.5) * 10) }}),
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    )
    ON CONFLICT (botanical_name) DO UPDATE SET
        sanskrit_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.sanskrit_name, ''), herbs_master.sanskrit_name),
        common_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.common_name, ''), herbs_master.common_name),
        classical_prominence = GREATEST(herbs_master.classical_prominence, {{ Math.round(Number($json.confidence || 0.5) * 10) }}),
        classical_frequency = herbs_master.classical_frequency + 1,
        updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    RETURNING herb_id
),
disease AS (
    INSERT INTO diseases_master (sanskrit_name, english_name, icd11_code, disease_category, mapping_confidence, mapping_method)
    VALUES (
        '{{ String($json.disease_sanskrit || "Unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ String($json.disease_english || "Unknown").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ String($json.icd11_code || "TM26.00").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ String($json.disease_category || "General").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        {{ Number($json.confidence || 0.5) }},
        'agent-extracted'
    )
    ON CONFLICT (sanskrit_name) DO UPDATE SET
        english_name = EXCLUDED.english_name,
        mapping_confidence = GREATEST(diseases_master.mapping_confidence, EXCLUDED.mapping_confidence),
        updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    RETURNING disease_id
)
INSERT INTO herb_disease_associations (
    herb_id, disease_id, disease_category, association_type, confidence_score,
    classical_mentions, source_texts, context_summary, extracted_at,
    prominence_score, corpus_batch, properties, evidence_context, original_disease_id,
    chunk_id, chunk_ids
)
SELECT
    herb.herb_id,
    disease.disease_id,
    '{{ String($json.disease_category || "General").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ["indicated","contraindicated","neutral","unknown"].includes($json.association) ? $json.association : "indicated" }}',
    {{ Math.min(1, Math.max(0, Number($json.confidence || 0.5))) }},
    1,
    ARRAY['{{ String($json.source || "TM2-150-Expanded").replace(/'/g, "''") }}']::text[],
    '{{ String($json.context || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.extracted_at || $now.toISOString()).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::timestamp,
    {{ Math.min(0.9999, Math.max(0, Number($json.confidence || 0.5))) }},
    'TM2-v1',
    '{{ String($json.properties || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ String($json.full_data_json || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.original_disease_id || 'NULL' }},
    '{{ String($json.chunk_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    ARRAY['{{ String($json.chunk_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}']::text[]
FROM herb, disease
ON CONFLICT (herb_id, disease_id) DO UPDATE SET
    -- Only increment mentions & merge data if this chunk_id is genuinely new
    classical_mentions = CASE
        WHEN EXCLUDED.chunk_id IS NOT NULL
         AND EXCLUDED.chunk_id != ''
         AND NOT (herb_disease_associations.chunk_ids @> ARRAY[EXCLUDED.chunk_id])
        THEN herb_disease_associations.classical_mentions + 1
        ELSE herb_disease_associations.classical_mentions
    END,
    source_texts = CASE
        WHEN EXCLUDED.chunk_id IS NOT NULL
         AND EXCLUDED.chunk_id != ''
         AND NOT (herb_disease_associations.chunk_ids @> ARRAY[EXCLUDED.chunk_id])
        THEN ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT unnest(herb_disease_associations.source_texts || EXCLUDED.source_texts))
        ELSE herb_disease_associations.source_texts
    END,
    chunk_ids = CASE
        WHEN EXCLUDED.chunk_id IS NOT NULL
         AND EXCLUDED.chunk_id != ''
         AND NOT (herb_disease_associations.chunk_ids @> ARRAY[EXCLUDED.chunk_id])
        THEN ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT unnest(herb_disease_associations.chunk_ids || ARRAY[EXCLUDED.chunk_id]))
        ELSE herb_disease_associations.chunk_ids
    END,
    chunk_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.chunk_id, ''), herb_disease_associations.chunk_id),
    confidence_score = GREATEST(herb_disease_associations.confidence_score, EXCLUDED.confidence_score),
    context_summary = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.context_summary, ''), herb_disease_associations.context_summary),
    properties = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.properties, ''), herb_disease_associations.properties),
    evidence_context = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.evidence_context, ''), herb_disease_associations.evidence_context),
    prominence_score = GREATEST(herb_disease_associations.prominence_score, EXCLUDED.prominence_score)
RETURNING association_id;

parameters.text:
=Disease: {{ $json.primary_sanskrit }} ({{ $json.primary_english }}) {{ $json.devanagari }}
ICD: {{ $json.icd }}
Category: {{ $json.category }}
ID: {{ $json.id }}


**MANDATORY workflow:**
1. **Qdrant retrieval:** Sequentially search:
   - "herb indicated in {{ $json.primary_sanskrit }}"
   - "plant indicated in {{ $json.primary_english }}"
   - "auṣadhi indicated in {{ $json.devanagari }}"
   
   → From chunks, **extract PLANT HERBS ONLY** (skip therapies: Taila/Nasya/Basti/Lepa/Abhyanga/Shirodhara/Virechana/Vamana; skip non-plants: Godugdha/Takra/Gghrita/minerals/metals).
   
   → Keep exact context text + chunk_id for each herb.

2. **Botanical resolution** (ONE herb at a time):
   - Use training data if known.
   - Else: SearXNG ONCE: `[herb name] plant scientific name` (exact format, no extras).
   - Take top 2-3 results → botanical name or `"botanical unverified"`.
   - Format: `"<Sanskrit> (<botanical or 'botanical unverified'>)"`

3. **Classify** from Qdrant context: `indicated` / `contraindicated` / `neutral`

**CRITICAL FORMAT:**
- ONLY raw JSON object. No markdown/explanation.
- No herbs: {"pairs": []}
- Top key: "pairs"
- Every pair needs: herb, disease, diseaseEnglish, icd11Code, association, confidence (NUMBER 0.3-1.0), context (≤150 chars), properties (ARRAY), chunk_id

**Example JSON:**
{
  "pairs": [
    {
      "herb": "Guduchi (Tinospora cordifolia)",
      "disease": "{{ $json.primary_sanskrit }}",
      "diseaseEnglish": "{{ $json.primary_english }}",
      "icd11_code": "{{ $json.icd }}",
      "association": "indicated",
      "confidence": 0.85,
      "context": "exact Qdrant quote ≤150 chars",
      "properties": ["antipyretic", "immunomodulator"],
      "chunk_id": "chunk-123"
    }
  ]
}

// ============================================
// ARISE Agent 0: Parse & Filter Node
// FULLY CONSOLIDATED WORKING VERSION
// ============================================
// This version fixes null value leakage by:
// 1. Separating valid results from skipped results
// 2. Returning ONLY valid items to downstream nodes
// 3. Logging skipped items for audit trail
// ============================================

const input = $input.item.json;

// ── DEBUG: Input structure validation ────────────────────────────────────────
console.log('=== ARISE Agent 0 Parser Started ===');
console.log('Input structure keys:', Object.keys(input));
console.log('Has output?', 'output' in input);
console.log('Has pairs?', 'pairs' in input);
console.log('Has output.pairs?', input.output?.pairs ? 'Yes' : 'No');

// ── STEP 1: Extract pairs array ─────────────────────────────────────────────
const pairs = input.output?.pairs || input.pairs || [];
console.log(`Found ${pairs.length} pairs in input`);

// ── STEP 2: Handle empty pairs ──────────────────────────────────────────────
if (!Array.isArray(pairs) || pairs.length === 0) {
  console.log('⚠️ No pairs found - returning skipped item');
  return [{ json: {
    skipped: true,
    reason: 'no_pairs_found',
    debug: 'pairs array empty or missing',
    disease_sanskrit: input.primary_sanskrit || 'Unknown',
    extracted_at: new Date().toISOString()
  } }];
}

// ── STEP 3: Confidence filter (≥0.7) ────────────────────────────────────────
const filteredPairs = pairs.filter(pair => (pair.confidence || 0) >= 0.7);
console.log(`${filteredPairs.length} pairs after confidence filter (≥0.7)`);

if (filteredPairs.length === 0) {
  console.log('⚠️ No high-confidence pairs - returning skipped item');
  return [{ json: {
    skipped: true,
    reason: 'no_high_confidence_pairs',
    total_pairs: pairs.length,
    max_confidence: Math.max(...pairs.map(p => p.confidence || 0)),
    disease_sanskrit: input.primary_sanskrit || 'Unknown',
    extracted_at: new Date().toISOString()
  } }];
}

};

// ── STEP 6: Flatten registry for fast lookup ──────────────────────────────────
const nonPlantTokenMap = {};
for (const [category, terms] of Object.entries(NON_PLANT_REGISTRY)) {
  for (const term of terms) {
    nonPlantTokenMap[term.toLowerCase().trim()] = category;
  }
}

// ── STEP 7: INVALID HERB VALUE GUARD ─────────────────────────────────────────
const INVALID_HERB_VALUES = new Set([
  '', 'null', 'unknown', 'n/a', 'none', 'undefined', '-', '—'
]);

function isInvalidHerb(herbName) {
  if (herbName === null || herbName === undefined) return true;
  return INVALID_HERB_VALUES.has(String(herbName).toLowerCase().trim());
}

// ── STEP 8: SAFER NON-PLANT DETECTION ────────────────────────────────────────
function isNonPlantSubstance(herbName) {
  if (!herbName) return false;
  const lower = herbName.toLowerCase().trim();
  // Exact match — always safe
  if (nonPlantTokenMap[lower] !== undefined) return true;
  // Forward partial: herbName contains a registered token
  const forwardMatch = Object.keys(nonPlantTokenMap).some(token =>
    token.length >= 5 && lower.includes(token)
  );
  if (forwardMatch) return true;
  // Reverse partial: a registered token contains herbName
  if (lower.length >= 6) {
    return Object.keys(nonPlantTokenMap).some(token =>
      token.includes(lower)
    );
  }
  return false;
}

function getSubstanceType(herbName) {
  if (!herbName) return 'plant';
  const lower = herbName.toLowerCase().trim();
  if (nonPlantTokenMap[lower]) return nonPlantTokenMap[lower];
  const matchedToken = Object.keys(nonPlantTokenMap).find(token =>
    (token.length >= 5 && lower.includes(token)) ||
    (lower.length >= 6 && token.includes(lower))
  );
  return matchedToken ? nonPlantTokenMap[matchedToken] : 'plant';
}

// ── STEP 9: HELPER FUNCTIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
function getScientificName(herbName) {
  if (!herbName) return '';
  if (botanicalLookup[herbName]) return botanicalLookup[herbName];
  const cleanName = herbName.split('(')[0].trim();
  if (botanicalLookup[cleanName]) return botanicalLookup[cleanName];
  const matchedKey = Object.keys(botanicalLookup).find(key =>
    key.includes(herbName) || herbName.includes(key)
  );
  return matchedKey ? botanicalLookup[matchedKey] : '';
}

function normalizeHerbName(herbName) {
  if (!herbName) return '';
  const normalizationMap = {
    "S'unthi": "Shunthi",
    "Devaddru": "Devadaru",
    "Deva-ddru": "Devadaru",
    "S'irisha": "Shirisha",
    "Katu-rohini": "Katu Rohini",
    "Kirata-tikta": "Kirata Tikta",
    "Yashti-madhu": "Yashtimadhu",
    "Manah-s'ild": "Manahshila",
    "Dashamoola": "Dashamoola (compound formula)",
    "Trikatu": "Trikatu (compound formula)",
    "Tri-katu": "Trikatu (compound formula)",
    "Chyawanprash": "Chyawanprash (compound formula)",
    "Pathyadi Shadanga Kwatha": "Pathyadi Shadanga Kwatha (compound formula)",
    "Amritadi Kwatha": "Amritadi Kwatha (compound formula)",
    "Hingvadi-Vati": "Hingvadi-Vati (compound formula)",
    "Sitopala": "Sitopala (rock sugar)",
    "सितोपल": "Sitopala (rock sugar)",
    "Gairika": "Gairika (red ochre mineral)",
    "Suvarna-Gairika": "Suvarna-Gairika (mineral compound)",
    "Kshira Taila": "Kshira Taila (oil preparation)",
    "Gandha Taila": "Gandha Taila (oil preparation)",
    "Tila-kailaka": "Tila-kailaka (compound formula)",
    "Tilakailaka": "Tila-kailaka (compound formula)",
    "Tila kailaka": "Tila-kailaka (compound formula)",
  };
  return normalizationMap[herbName] || herbName;
}

// ── STEP 10: MAIN PROCESSING ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
const validResults = [];
const skippedResults = [];

for (const pair of filteredPairs) {
  const herbName = pair.herb || '';
  
  // ── FIX 1: Skip null/unknown herbs immediately ──────────────────────────────
  if (isInvalidHerb(herbName)) {
    console.log(`⚠️ Skipping invalid herb: "${herbName}"`);
    skippedResults.push({ json: {
      skipped: true,
      reason: 'invalid_herb_name',
      debug: `herb value was: ${JSON.stringify(herbName)}`,
      disease_sanskrit: input.primary_sanskrit || pair.disease || 'Unknown',
      original_disease_id: input.id || null,
      extracted_at: new Date().toISOString()
    }});
    continue;
  }
  
  const diseaseSanskrit = input.primary_sanskrit || pair.disease || 'Unknown';
  const diseaseEnglish = input.primary_english || pair.diseaseEnglish || 'Unknown';
  const icdCode = input.icd || pair.icd11Code || 'TM26.00';
  const diseaseCategory = input.category || 'General';
  const normalizedHerbName = normalizeHerbName(herbName);
  const cleanHerbName = normalizedHerbName.split('(')[0].trim();
  const scientificName = getScientificName(normalizedHerbName) ||
                         getScientificName(cleanHerbName) || '';
  const isNonPlant = isNonPlantSubstance(normalizedHerbName) ||
                     isNonPlantSubstance(cleanHerbName);
  const substanceType = isNonPlant
    ? (getSubstanceType(normalizedHerbName) || getSubstanceType(cleanHerbName) || 'unknown_non_plant')
    : 'plant';
  
  let propertiesString = '';
  if (Array.isArray(pair.properties)) {
    propertiesString = pair.properties.join(', ');
  } else if (typeof pair.properties === 'string') {
    propertiesString = pair.properties;
  }
  
  validResults.push({
    json: {
      herb: cleanHerbName,
      herb_sanskrit: cleanHerbName,
      herb_scientific: scientificName,
      chunk_id: pair.chunk_id || '',
      is_non_plant: isNonPlant,
      substance_type: substanceType,
      skip_reason: isNonPlant ? `non-plant: ${substanceType}` : '',
      disease_sanskrit: diseaseSanskrit,
      disease_english: diseaseEnglish,
      icd11_code: icdCode,
      disease_category: diseaseCategory,
      confidence: pair.confidence || 0.5,
      association: pair.association || 'indicated',
      context: pair.context || '',
      properties: propertiesString,
      original_disease_id: input.id || null,
      source: pair.source || 'TM2-150-Expanded',
      skipped: false,
      extracted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      full_data_json: JSON.stringify({
        herb: herbName,
        herb_sanskrit: cleanHerbName,
        herb_scientific: scientificName,
        disease_sanskrit: diseaseSanskrit,
        disease_english: diseaseEnglish,
        chunk_id: pair.chunk_id || '', 
        icd11_code: icdCode,
        disease_category: diseaseCategory,
        confidence: pair.confidence || 0.5,
        association: pair.association || 'indicated',
        context: pair.context || '',
        properties: pair.properties || [],
        original_disease_id: input.id || null,
        source: pair.source || 'TM2-150-Expanded',
        is_non_plant: isNonPlant,
        substance_type: substanceType
      })
    }
  });
}

// ── STEP 11: OUTPUT SUMMARY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
console.log(`\n=== ARISE Agent 0 Parser Complete ===`);
console.log(`Total input pairs: ${filteredPairs.length}`);
console.log(`Valid items returned: ${validResults.length}`);
console.log(`Skipped items filtered: ${skippedResults.length}`);
console.log(`Non-plant substances: ${validResults.filter(r => r.json.is_non_plant).length}`);

if (skippedResults.length > 0) {
  console.log(`\n⚠️ Skipped items (not returned to downstream):`);
  skippedResults.forEach((item, idx) => {
    console.log(`  ${idx + 1}. ${item.json.reason}: ${item.json.debug}`);
  });
}

if (validResults.length > 0) {
  const firstValid = validResults.find(r => !r.json.skipped);
  if (firstValid) {
    console.log(`\n✓ Sample valid output:`);
    console.log(JSON.stringify(firstValid.json, null, 2));
  }
}

// ── STEP 12: RETURN ONLY VALID ITEMS ─────────────────────────────────────────
// CRITICAL FIX: Don't return skipped items to downstream nodes
return validResults;
